free_text: Investigation of Ba-134 Gamma-Radiation in the
Fast neutron beam of the thermal reactor
Ba-C-O3 sample, mass 14.5 gram, size 4.3*4.1 cm,
Ba-134 content is 83 % , Ba-135 content is 7.6 % ,
Ba-136 content is 1.6 % , Ba-137 content is 1.4 % ,
.Gamma rays energy is taken at the angle 90 degree
relative to the incident neutron beam
Error of the nominator gamma energy
Reaction Code modified according to NNDC
Some uncertainty in initial level is present
Legendre coefficients for gamma-lines, not placed in
Linear polarization P was determined by N = ratio of
counts measured at 90 degrees to 0 degrees by
polarimeter and R = sensitivity of polarimeter,
